applyTo: '**'

# Project Context

Blog
- This project is a personal blog built with Astro.
- The blog will feature posts about web development, programming, and technology.
- The target audience is developers and tech enthusiasts.
- The blog will include code snippets, tutorials, and articles on various topics.
- The blog will be written in Spanish and english.

# Arquitectura y Patrones Clave
- The project uses Astro as the static site generator.
- The project follows a component-based architecture.
- The project uses Markdown for writing blog posts.
- The project uses GitHub for version control and collaboration.
